sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: It's happening again...

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: I can't sleep at all.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: How many days has it been? Three? Four?

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: My body feels completely exhausted, yet my mind refuses to shut down.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Staring at this moldy ceiling in my cramped apartment isn't going to help me fall back asleep.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Cold water. That's what I need.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: God, I look terrible. The bags under my eyes are practically bruising.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: It's barely 5 AM. I should probably get something to eat before getting ready for Kousei University.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Let's just cook. I've got plenty of time.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: I'm feeling lazy... let's just order.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Well, that hits the spot. My stomach has stopped complaining at least.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Time to get dressed. If I leave now, I can beat the morning rush hour.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: How should I get to campus today?

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Morning walks are so refreshing...

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Though it's exhausting with how little sleep I've had.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: The metro isn't too crowded this early in the morning.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: I can actually get a seat for once.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Looks like it's not too crowded at this time.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Made it. The classroom is mostly empty this early.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: I'll just take my usual seat at the back and wait for the lecture to start.

sequence.speaker: Akihito
sequence.text: Hopefully, I won't pass out during Professor Sato's class.
